National Front for the Liberation of South Vietnam
description: revolutionary organization active in South Vietnam and Cambodia from 1960 to 1977
description_wiki: The Viet Cong (VC) was an epithet and umbrella term to refer to the communist-led armed movement and united front organization in South Vietnam.
Laos, officially the Lao People's Democratic Republic (LPDR), is a country in Mainland Southeast Asia, and the only landlocked country in Southeast Asia.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: refugee camp in Thailand from 1975 until 1992
description_wiki: Ban Vinai Refugee Camp, officially the Ban Vinai Holding Center, was a refugee camp in Thailand from 1975 until 1992.

description: city in and county seat of Outagamie County, Wisconsin, United States
description_wiki: Appleton (Menominee: Ahkōnemeh) is the county seat of Outagamie County, Wisconsin, United States, with small portions extending into Calumet and Winnebago counties.
